org.docgene.model

Class XMLSpan

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLSpan
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    FontType, ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.SpanTextElement, org.docgene.model.StylableText, StyledElement

    public class XMLSpan
extends java.lang.Object
implements org.docgene.model.StylableText, org.docgene.model.SpanTextElement, FontType
    Represent a sentence in a pre element. version 1.6.7.4

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.FontType

        BOLD, ITALIC, REGULAR, STRIKETHROUGH, SUBSCRIPT, SUPERSCRIPT, UNDERLINE
